comment.body:
This has been discussed multiple times here and everywhere else, and Alma has explained it more than once:
VIX measures the volatility of ATM options with 30 days to expiration..always the ATM strikes, plus the wings with different weightings.
That’s why VIX naturally drops even when the market falls, because on the vol smile, if the strike shifts left (down), IV rises, and if it moves up, IV drops. Fixed-strike vol is what really matters, and from what Alma has written, that’s what she watches.
Just look at the term structure and observe how it moves. Every broker platform provides IV data..find it on yours.
Honestly, I don’t even understand how people trade without knowing these basics.

Honestly, I don’t even understand how people trade without knowing these basics.
